message:
Your dog understands way more than "sit" and "treat." 🧠🐶 The average dog can learn around 165 words and gestures — about the same as a 2-year-old toddler. And the superstars? A border collie named Chaser learned the names of over 1,000 different toys and could fetch each one by name. So yes... your pup absolutely knows what "W-A-L-K" means. 🚶🐾

Comment the ONE word that makes your dog lose their mind! 😂
